nodes.label: Three-Step Update Flow (Match/Propose/Confirm)
nodes.rationale: Three-step Match->Propose->Confirm backend for knowledge note updates. An architect describes what to change in natural language, receives a list of matching notes ranked by relevance, gets a diff-annotated proposed edit per note, and confirms the write. No LLM output silently overwrites Neo4j.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: POST /knowledge/update/match
nodes.rationale: Direct Neo4j full-text search using knowledge_note_search index. Returns top 10 candidates ranked by full-text relevance score. Lives entirely in data-serviceвЂ”no n8n involvement.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: POST /knowledge/update/propose
nodes.rationale: Accepts array of noteIds, fetches current note content from Neo4j, sends to n8n knowledge-update webhook, polls for LLM-proposed text, computes word-level HTML diff with Python difflib, returns per-note diff.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: POST /knowledge/update/confirm
nodes.rationale: Optimistic locking via updatedAt comparisonвЂ”returns 409 on mismatch. Enforces 100KB content limit. Writes updated note content and creates KnowledgeSession with mode=update.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Word-Level HTML Diff via difflib
nodes.rationale: Tokenizes original and proposed text on whitespace, runs SequenceMatcher(autojunk=False), emits HTML spans with diff-del and diff-ins classes. Replaces earlier approach of LLM-annotated [DEL]/[INS] markers.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: call_n8n_sync Polling Helper
nodes.rationale: Fires n8n webhook via urllib.request, receives executionId, polls EXECUTION_RESULTS in-memory dict with 120s timeout and 1.5s sleep interval. Returns payload on completion, raises 502 on failure, 504 on timeout.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Optimistic Locking via updatedAt
nodes.rationale: Client sends updatedAt from propose step; server reads current updatedAt from Neo4j and comparesвЂ”returns 409 Conflict if modified since. Simple string comparison, no DB-level lock needed at current scale.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: knowledge_note_search Full-Text Index
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Knowledge Update n8n Workflow
nodes.rationale: 8-node n8n workflow: webhook -> Set Input Defaults -> [Format Ack -> Respond Ack | Build Update Prompt -> Ollama Generate (plain text, no format:json) -> Parse LLM Text -> Post Execution Result]. Does NOT write to Neo4jвЂ”read/transform/notify only.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Tabbed Sidebar: DesignRules / Specs&Notes
nodes.rationale: Two top-level tabs at top of sidebar beneath Project back button. DesignRules wraps existing MODE_OPTIONS (Insert/Query/Edit Rules). Specs&Notes has KNOWLEDGE_OPTIONS dropdown (Insert/Query/Update Knowledge). Graph View and Clear the Graph hidden in Specs&Notes.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Insert Knowledge Panel (From Folder / From Prompt)
nodes.rationale: Two sub-tabs: From Folder shows text input with Docker path tooltip and synchronous POST to /knowledge/ingest/folder. From Prompt shows NL textarea and async polling via startKnowledgePollingLatest. Both display results in shared Response textarea.
nodes.norm_label: insert knowledge panel (from folder / from prompt)
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Query Knowledge Panel
nodes.rationale: Mirrors existing Query Rules layout: prompt textarea, Query Knowledge button, progress bar, step indicators, Response textarea for NL answer, Workflow Cypher textarea. Uses workflow key knowledge-query with async polling.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Update Knowledge Panel (Match/Propose/Review Views)
nodes.rationale: Match view: prompt textarea, Search Notes button, candidate checkbox list with score badges, Select all/Deselect all. Propose view: dimmed candidate list, step indicators, progress bar, synchronous fetch to /knowledge/update/propose. Review view transitions with diff display.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: KnowledgeSession Audit Trail
nodes.rationale: Every insert, query, and update operation writes a KnowledgeSession node with mode, prompt, result, project, graph, and createdAt. GET /knowledge/sessions/{project} returns all sessions in reverse-chronological order.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Async Polling UX Pattern with Step Indicators
nodes.rationale: Reuses existing startPollingResult pattern with knowledge-specific step labels (Send prompt, Extracting title/tags, Writing to graph, Recording session, Complete for insert; Send question, Searching knowledge graph, Generating answer, Recording session, Complete for query). Knowledge state variables are fully independent from DesignRules state.
nodes.norm_label: async polling ux pattern with step indicators
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Tab State Isolation Pattern
nodes.rationale: When switching between DesignRules and Specs&Notes tabs, all state persistsвЂ”prompt text, response text, graph view, etc. are kept per-tab (not cleared). Knowledge state uses separate variables with knowledge prefix to avoid cross-contamination.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: n8n Async Ack Fork Pattern
nodes.rationale: Standard n8n pattern for long-running workflows: webhook -> Set Input Defaults -> [Fork: Format Ack -> Respond Ack] (immediate 200 with executionId) -> work path (Ollama, processing) -> Post Execution Result.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: XSS Mitigation in word_diff_html
nodes.rationale: Added html.escape() wrapper around all word outputs in word_diff_html before inserting into span markup to prevent stored XSS vector from note content containing HTML. T-06-03 mitigiated.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: ROADMAP Path Drift (n8n vs data-service endpoints)
nodes.rationale: ROADMAP SC-1 and SC-2 specify POST /knowledge/ingest/prompt and POST /knowledge/query as data-service endpoints, but implementation exposes the same functionality through n8n webhook paths (/n8n/webhook/dg/knowledge-ingest and /n8n/webhook/dg/knowledge-query) per CONTEXT.md decision D-09. Documentation drift, not functional gap.
nodes.norm_label: roadmap path drift (n8n vs data-service endpoints)
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Knowledge n8n Webhook Paths
nodes.rationale: Standardized webhook paths: dg/knowledge-ingest, dg/knowledge-query, dg/knowledge-update. Reached via Nginx /n8n/ proxy.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: N8N_INTERNAL_URL and Docker Network
nodes.rationale: N8N_INTERNAL_URL=http://n8n:5678 added to data-service environment in docker-compose.yml. n8n added to data-service depends_on. Required for call_n8n_sync to reach n8n within Docker network.
nodes.community_name: Phase 3: n8n Knowledge Workflows + LLM Ingest/Query

nodes.label: Candidate Checkbox List with Score Badges
nodes.norm_label: candidate checkbox list with score badges

nodes.label: GitHub-Style Red/Green Diff Styling
nodes.rationale: Deliberate user preference override of specification's red strikethrough approach; matches architect expectation from code review workflows

nodes.label: DangerouslySetInnerHTML Diff Rendering
nodes.rationale: Backend returns pre-computed diffHtml with span.diff-del/ins classes; no client-side diff library needed, no build step required

nodes.label: State Leakage Between Update Sessions
nodes.rationale: React state persists across re-renders; all six update state variables must be reset simultaneously on Back to search and after Confirm

nodes.label: React Text Children XSS Mitigation
nodes.rationale: All session text rendered as React text children via createElement, not dangerouslySetInnerHTML вЂ” React auto-escapes HTML entities

nodes.label: DGST-01 Gap: Missing DESIGN STATE Component
nodes.rationale: Phase 1 claimed DGST-01 complete but only built data contracts; the Grasshopper DESIGN STATE component was missing until retroactively added in commit b73e8d9 during Phase 3 UAT
nodes.norm_label: dgst-01 gap: missing design state component

nodes.label: DGCL-02 Gap: Disconnected State Persistence Chain
nodes.rationale: Phase 2 claimed DGCL-02 complete but Classificator discarded state in status message only; no code path wrote statePayloadJson to Neo4j. Fixed retroactively in commit d856ca4 wiring 6 broken links
nodes.norm_label: dgcl-02 gap: disconnected state persistence chain

nodes.label: Phase 3 UAT Gap Closure Retrofit
nodes.rationale: End-to-end flow DESIGN STATE -> Classificator -> Validator -> Neo4j -> VALIDATION RUNS was only testable after retroactive gap closure commits b73e8d9 and d856ca4

nodes.label: Phase 6 Design Discussion Alternatives
nodes.rationale: Audit trail of alternatives considered for candidate list, diff layout, multi-note flow, and propose wait UX before decisions were locked in CONTEXT.md

nodes.label: Phase 7 Design Discussion Alternatives
nodes.rationale: Audit trail of alternatives for session placement, layout, filter, KnowledgeGraph toggle, and restore behavior

nodes.label: Atomic Pre-Validation (D-05/D-06)
nodes.rationale: Single parameter failure aborts ALL writes -- prevents partial state application and ensures data consistency across all targets.

nodes.label: StateId Guard (D-09)
nodes.rationale: Prevents redundant re-application of the same snapshot. Caller-provided lastAppliedStateId allows GH component to manage instance state, returning all parameters as Unchanged when same StateId is re-applied.

nodes.label: Rising-Edge Trigger Detection (D-08)
nodes.rationale: Boolean Apply input fires only on false-to-true transition, not on sustained true. GH Button emits a single true pulse naturally so no timer/debounce needed.

nodes.label: Defensive JSON Projection Pattern
nodes.rationale: Never raise on absent/malformed/deep-nested payloads. Catch JSONDecodeError, ValueError, TypeError, RecursionError. Return None for any non-dict JSON value. Pattern ensures forward compatibility across Python 3.11 (container) and 3.14 (local dev).

nodes.label: What+Where+How-to-Fix Message Format
nodes.rationale: Every user-facing error message follows the template: '{What failed}: {specific identifier}. {How to fix}.' Pattern ensures architects can diagnose and resolve issues without cross-referencing documentation. Applied across C# (ErrorMessageTemplates), Python (_structured_error_response), and JavaScript (extractErrorMessage) layers.

nodes.label: Human UAT Scenarios
nodes.rationale: Five cross-phase smoke test scenarios: Full State Lifecycle (INTG-01), Legacy No-State Flow (INTG-02), Reinstatement Round-Trip (REIN-01..03), Error Message Quality (INTG-03), Grouping Switch + Resize Handle.

nodes.label: Hybrid E2E + Manual UAT Verification
nodes.rationale: Automated C# integration tests (live docker-compose stack) plus manual UAT checklist. Live stack chosen over Testcontainers or mocks per gap-closure lesson that mocked chains hide real failure modes.

nodes.label: Live Docker-Compose Stack for E2E
nodes.rationale: Tests assert stack is up, seed temp project, exercise flow, clean up. No Testcontainers, no in-memory mocks -- mirrored how UAT runs. Matches gap-closure lesson: mocked chains hide the real failure mode.

nodes.label: PopulateVariables Kind Inference Logic
nodes.rationale: Variable kind (Object vs Property) inferred from atom structure at read time in Neo4jRuleRepository.PopulateVariables(), not stored as a property on Var nodes. Prevents schema change in Neo4j and n8n prompt updates.

nodes.label: DesignState Single Label + kind Property
nodes.rationale: Single label `DesignState` with `kind: 'DefState'|'ObjectState'` property chosen over multi-label or separate labels. Mirrors established `Rule.kind` pattern. Avoids inconsistent NeoVis rendering and ambiguous Cypher MATCH queries.

nodes.label: IdRef Cache Keyed on DefState Hash
nodes.rationale: DESIGN STATE component caches element ID references by DefState content hash. Rebuilds IdRefs only when DefState.StateId changes. Prevents expensive Rhino geometry re-scan on every SolveInstance (e.g., during slider drag).
nodes.norm_label: idref cache keyed on defstate hash

nodes.label: METAGRAPH as Single Neo4j Consumer
nodes.rationale: Only METAGRAPH and CONNECTOR need database credentials. All downstream components (RULE DECONSTRUCT, CLASSIFICATOR, DESIGN STATE) operate on data already loaded by METAGRAPH. Keeps network dependency surface minimal.

nodes.label: UI Rebuild Procedure
nodes.rationale: `--no-cache` is required because Docker layer caching can serve stale index.html; after rebuild, hard-refresh or use incognito to bypass browser cache.

nodes.label: Conditional Compilation Pattern
nodes.rationale: `#if GRASSHOPPER_SDK` guards all GH-dependent code so DG.Grasshopper compiles as a placeholder without Rhino SDK installed.

nodes.label: Async Polling Pattern
nodes.rationale: Components use ScheduleSolution() + task caching instead of blocking the GH UI thread.

nodes.label: SWRL Parsing Pattern
nodes.rationale: Bespoke regex parser, not a vendor OWL library; handles Class(?var), Property(?var1, ?var2), and Builtin(?var, literal) patterns.
